╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║         🔒 SEALED & LOCKED MODULE PROMPT — ESIGN_CONNECT                       ║
║         EXECUTION ENGINE : ANTIGRAVITY                                         ║
║         PARENT PLATFORM  : ECOSKILLER ENTERPRISE SAAS                         ║
║         MODULE CLASS     : TRUST · LEGAL · LIFECYCLE BINDING                  ║
╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🔐 EXECUTION LOCK HEADER
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

EXECUTION_MODE             = LOCKED
MUTATION_POLICY            = ADD_ONLY
CREATIVE_INTERPRETATION    = FORBIDDEN
ASSUMPTION_FILLING         = FORBIDDEN
DEFAULT_BEHAVIOR           = DENY
FAILURE_MODE               = STOP_EXECUTION
MODULE_CODENAME            = ESIGN_CONNECT
ENGINE_TARGET              = ANTIGRAVITY
PARENT_PROMPT_INHERIT      = ECOSKILLER_MASTER_SEALED_PROMPT
STAGE_BINDING              = STAGE_1_FOUNDATION + STAGE_4_COMPLIANCE
COMPLIANCE_LAYER           = MANDATORY_INHERIT
DUPLICATION_OF_BASE_RULES  = FORBIDDEN

⚠️  ANTIGRAVITY MUST NOT reinterpret, simplify, or extend this module
    beyond what is explicitly stated here.
⚠️  Any output that conflicts with the Master Sealed Prompt = HARD REJECTION.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
1️⃣  MODULE IDENTITY (NON-NEGOTIABLE)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

MODULE_NAME           = ESIGN_CONNECT
MODULE_TYPE           = ELECTRONIC SIGNATURE + DOCUMENT BINDING LAYER
MODULE_CATEGORY       =
  - Digital Offer Signing
  - Contract & NDA Execution
  - Mentor / Trainer Agreement Binding
  - Institute Enrollment Consent
  - Corporate–SME Hiring Agreements
  - Compliance Consent Records
  - Parent Trust-Layer Authorization

MODULE_POSITION_IN_PLATFORM =
  Cross-cutting module — horizontally injected into:
    → Job Portal Engine (Offer Letters)
    → Skill Development Engine (Training Agreements)
    → Project Execution Engine (Mentor Contracts)
    → Group Discussion / Dojo (Evaluation Consent)
    → ERP Layer (Institute, Corporate, SME Contracts)
    → Compliance & Audit Layer (Immutable Record)

MODULE_PURPOSE =
  ESIGN_CONNECT replaces all paper-based, email-based, or unverified
  document signing with a cryptographically sealed, legally valid,
  multi-party electronic signature workflow — native to the
  Ecoskiller platform — requiring zero external signature tools.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
2️⃣  LEGAL COMPLIANCE FRAMEWORK (LOCKED — JURISDICTION AWARE)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

PRIMARY_LEGAL_STANDARDS =
  - IT Act 2000 (India) — Section 5 Legal Recognition of E-Signatures
  - Aadhaar eSign API (India) — Aadhaar-linked signature support
  - eIDAS Regulation (EU) — Advanced + Qualified Electronic Signatures
  - ESIGN Act (USA) — Electronic Signatures in Global & National Commerce
  - UETA (USA) — Uniform Electronic Transactions Act
  - GDPR (EU) — Consent data management & right-to-erasure
  - PDPB (India) — Personal Data Protection Bill data handling
  - ISO 27001 — Document security controls
  - ISO 32000-1 — PDF/A archival standard

SIGNATURE_TYPES_SUPPORTED =
  SIMPLE_ELECTRONIC_SIGNATURE (SES)   → Email OTP + platform auth
  ADVANCED_ELECTRONIC_SIGNATURE (AES) → Public key cryptography + MFA
  AADHAAR_ESIGN               → Aadhaar OTP-linked, UIDAI API
  QUALIFIED_ELECTRONIC_SIGNATURE (QES)→ eIDAS-compliant, CA-issued cert

SIGNATURE_TYPE_ASSIGNMENT =
  | Document Type              | Required Sig Level |
  |-----------------------------|--------------------|
  | Offer Letter (Student)      | SES + AES          |
  | NDA (Enterprise)            | AES                |
  | Internship Agreement        | SES                |
  | Mentor Contract             | SES                |
  | Institute Partnership MOU   | AES                |
  | SME Hiring Contract         | AES                |
  | Parent Authorization        | SES + OTP          |
  | Regulatory / Compliance Doc | QES (where required)|

COMPLIANCE_RULES =
  - Jurisdiction auto-detected from tenant profile
  - Signature level auto-upgraded if jurisdiction demands it
  - Downgrade of signature level = FORBIDDEN
  - Undated or unsigned document storage = FORBIDDEN

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
3️⃣  USER ECOSYSTEM INTEGRATION (STRICTLY ENFORCED)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

SIGNER_ROLES (INHERITED FROM MASTER PROMPT — READ-ONLY):
  STUDENT            → Signs: Offer letters, internship agreements, consent forms
  TRAINER / MENTOR   → Signs: Training contracts, mentorship agreements, NDAs
  EVALUATOR          → Signs: Evaluation declarations, anti-cheat certifications
  INSTITUTE          → Signs: MOUs, enrollment consents, data agreements
  ENTERPRISE         → Signs: Hiring contracts, NDAs, service agreements
  RECRUITER / HR     → Signs: Offer letters, agency agreements
  ADMIN              → Signs: Compliance declarations, audit acknowledgments
  PARENT             → Signs / Authorizes: Minor consent, read-only trust docs
  AI / AUTOMATION    → CANNOT SIGN — AI may draft, never execute binding signature

ROLE_BASED_SIGNING_RULES =
  - Each signer must be identity-verified before signing (RBAC + MFA)
  - Signing permissions derived from role + tenant + domain (NO overrides)
  - Cross-tenant signing = FORBIDDEN without explicit cross-tenant agreement record
  - Parent can only authorize — never act as primary contract party
  - AI agents flagged as PROPOSED_SIGNER is a SYSTEM_ERROR → STOP

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
4️⃣  DOCUMENT LIFECYCLE STATES (HARD LOCK — STATE MACHINE)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

ESIGN_DOCUMENT_STATES =

  DRAFT
    → Created by initiating party
    → Not visible to signers
    → Editable by initiator only
    → No signing permitted

  SENT_FOR_REVIEW
    → Visible to all signers (read-only preview)
    → Comment / objection window active
    → No signatures collected yet
    → Initiator can recall (→ DRAFT) or proceed (→ PENDING_SIGNATURES)

  PENDING_SIGNATURES
    → Signing order enforced if sequential signing enabled
    → Signing deadline timer active
    → Reminders auto-fired at: 48hr, 24hr, 6hr before deadline
    → Partial signatures accepted (state persists until all signed)
    → Cannot be edited — edit → VOID + new DRAFT

  PARTIALLY_SIGNED
    → ≥1 signer completed, not all parties signed
    → Sub-state of PENDING_SIGNATURES
    → Visible audit trail of who has/hasn't signed

  COMPLETED
    → All parties signed
    → Document cryptographically sealed (SHA-256 + RSA/ECDSA)
    → PDF/A archive generated
    → Immutable — no edits, no recalls
    → Stored in distributed immutable record

  EXPIRED
    → Signing deadline passed, not all signatures collected
    → Automatically voided on expiry
    → Initiator notified → must issue new DRAFT

  VOIDED
    → Manually cancelled by authorized initiator before COMPLETED
    → Reason for void = MANDATORY field
    → Audit log entry created
    → Cannot transition back to any active state

  DISPUTED
    → A party has raised a legal challenge post-COMPLETED
    → Document locked: no further mutations
    → Escalated to Compliance Admin + Audit Trail
    → Resolution → DISPUTE_RESOLVED or LEGALLY_CHALLENGED

STATE_TRANSITION_RULES =
  DRAFT → SENT_FOR_REVIEW (initiator action)
  SENT_FOR_REVIEW → PENDING_SIGNATURES (initiator confirms)
  SENT_FOR_REVIEW → DRAFT (recall)
  PENDING_SIGNATURES → PARTIALLY_SIGNED (first signature collected)
  PENDING_SIGNATURES → EXPIRED (deadline elapsed)
  PARTIALLY_SIGNED → COMPLETED (final signature collected)
  PARTIALLY_SIGNED → EXPIRED (deadline elapsed)
  PENDING_SIGNATURES → VOIDED (initiator cancels)
  COMPLETED → DISPUTED (party raises challenge)
  DISPUTED → DISPUTE_RESOLVED | LEGALLY_CHALLENGED

ILLEGAL_TRANSITIONS = ANY NOT LISTED ABOVE → STOP_EXECUTION

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
5️⃣  DOCUMENT TYPES & TEMPLATES (LOCKED REGISTRY)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

REGISTERED_DOCUMENT_TEMPLATES =

  DOC_TYPE_001 = OFFER_LETTER
    Initiator     : Recruiter / HR
    Signers       : Recruiter → Student (sequential)
    Expiry Window : 7 days
    Signature Lvl : SES + AES
    Integration   : Job Portal → Offer Locking & Audit Trail

  DOC_TYPE_002 = INTERNSHIP_AGREEMENT
    Initiator     : Enterprise / Institute
    Signers       : Enterprise → Institute → Student → Parent (if minor)
    Expiry Window : 5 days
    Signature Lvl : SES
    Integration   : Job Portal + ERP Layer

  DOC_TYPE_003 = NDA_CORPORATE
    Initiator     : Enterprise / Recruiter
    Signers       : Enterprise → Student / Trainer (parallel or sequential)
    Expiry Window : 3 days
    Signature Lvl : AES
    Integration   : Job Portal + Compliance ERP

  DOC_TYPE_004 = MENTOR_AGREEMENT
    Initiator     : Platform Admin / Institute
    Signers       : Mentor → Student (sequential)
    Expiry Window : 10 days
    Signature Lvl : SES
    Integration   : Project Execution Engine

  DOC_TYPE_005 = TRAINING_CONTRACT
    Initiator     : Trainer / Institute
    Signers       : Trainer → Student → Institute Admin
    Expiry Window : 7 days
    Signature Lvl : SES
    Integration   : Skill Development Engine

  DOC_TYPE_006 = INSTITUTE_MOU
    Initiator     : Platform Admin
    Signers       : Platform → Institute Admin (sequential)
    Expiry Window : 14 days
    Signature Lvl : AES
    Integration   : Institute ERP

  DOC_TYPE_007 = PARENT_AUTHORIZATION
    Initiator     : Student / Institute
    Signers       : Parent (OTP-verified)
    Expiry Window : 5 days
    Signature Lvl : SES + OTP
    Integration   : Parent Trust Layer

  DOC_TYPE_008 = EVALUATION_CONSENT
    Initiator     : Evaluator
    Signers       : Student → Evaluator
    Expiry Window : 24 hours
    Signature Lvl : SES
    Integration   : Group Discussion / Dojo Engine

  DOC_TYPE_009 = SME_HIRING_CONTRACT
    Initiator     : SME / Recruiter
    Signers       : SME → Candidate
    Expiry Window : 5 days
    Signature Lvl : AES
    Integration   : SME Hiring Workflow ERP

  DOC_TYPE_010 = COMPLIANCE_DECLARATION
    Initiator     : Compliance Admin
    Signers       : Admin (internal only)
    Expiry Window : 30 days
    Signature Lvl : QES
    Integration   : Compliance & Audit ERP

CUSTOM_TEMPLATE_POLICY =
  Tenants (Enterprise / Institute) may create custom templates ONLY via:
    → Template Builder (admin-only tool)
    → Approval by Platform Compliance Admin
    → Version-controlled, audit-logged
  Custom templates that bypass required fields = REJECTED
  Platform Admin reserves right to suspend non-compliant templates

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
6️⃣  SIGNING WORKFLOW ENGINE (FUNCTIONAL SPEC — LOCKED)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

SIGNING_MODES =
  SEQUENTIAL   → Signers notified and sign in defined order
  PARALLEL     → All signers notified simultaneously
  HYBRID       → Group A sequential within group, groups in parallel

SIGNING_MODES_PER_DOC_TYPE =
  Defined in REGISTERED_DOCUMENT_TEMPLATES (Section 5)
  Tenant cannot override signing mode for system-level document types
  Custom templates may define own mode (subject to compliance approval)

IDENTITY_VERIFICATION_BEFORE_SIGN (MANDATORY) =
  Step 1 : Platform session auth (RBAC enforced)
  Step 2 : MFA challenge (TOTP / SMS OTP / Aadhaar OTP)
  Step 3 : Biometric acknowledgment (mobile — device fingerprint / FaceID)
  Step 4 : Signature intent declaration ("I agree to sign this document")
  Step 5 : Cryptographic key binding (server-side HSM for AES / QES)

  ALL 5 STEPS MANDATORY for AES and QES
  STEPS 1–3 MANDATORY for SES
  Skipping any step → SIGNING_BLOCKED

SIGNING_CAPTURE_METHODS =
  TYPED_NAME      → Signer types full legal name (converts to styled e-sig)
  DRAWN_SIGNATURE → Canvas draw (mobile / desktop) → SVG stored
  UPLOADED_IMAGE  → Signature image upload (PNG/SVG max 512KB)
  AADHAAR_ESIGN   → Redirect to UIDAI Aadhaar eSign API
  DIGITAL_CERT    → Upload .p12 / .pfx certificate for QES

  DEFAULT for students  : TYPED_NAME + DRAWN_SIGNATURE
  DEFAULT for enterprise: TYPED_NAME + DIGITAL_CERT (AES)
  Aadhaar eSign         : India jurisdiction only

SIGNATURE_PLACEMENT =
  Initiator defines signature fields on document (drag-and-drop in editor)
  Each field tagged: signer_role + field_type + required/optional
  Untagged signature placement = DOCUMENT_VALIDATION_FAILURE

WITNESS_SUPPORT =
  Optional witness can be added per document
  Witness signs after all primary signers
  Witness identity verified same as standard signer
  Witness has no contractual obligation — attestation role only

COUNTER-SIGNING =
  Supported: Enterprise HR counter-signs after student
  Counter-signer defined at document initiation
  Cannot be added post PENDING_SIGNATURES state

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
7️⃣  CRYPTOGRAPHIC INTEGRITY LAYER (SECURITY — HARD LOCK)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

DOCUMENT_HASHING =
  Algorithm         : SHA-256 (per-signature block) + SHA-512 (final sealed doc)
  Hash Timing       : Computed at each signature event + final seal
  Hash Storage      : Immutable append-only ledger (PostgreSQL + Kafka event log)

SIGNATURE_ENCRYPTION =
  SES Level         : HMAC-SHA256 (platform-managed key)
  AES Level         : RSA-2048 or ECDSA P-256 (HSM-managed key)
  QES Level         : CA-issued certificate (external PKI chain)
  Key Management    : AWS KMS or Azure Key Vault (tenant-isolated key spaces)

DOCUMENT_SEALING (POST-COMPLETION) =
  Format            : PDF/A-3 with embedded signature metadata
  Seal Method       : LTV (Long-Term Validation) signature embedding
  Timestamp         : RFC 3161 Trusted Timestamp Authority (TSA)
  Fingerprint       : Document fingerprint stored in immutable audit log
  Certificate Chain : Embedded within PDF for offline verification

TAMPER DETECTION =
  Any modification post-COMPLETED → hash mismatch → TAMPER_ALERT
  Tamper alert → Immediate notification to Compliance Admin
  Tampered document → Quarantined, flagged DISPUTED
  Audit log entry created with delta report

PRIVATE KEY SECURITY =
  No private key ever stored on client device
  All cryptographic operations via server-side HSM
  Key rotation policy: 90-day rotation for SES, 365-day for AES
  Compromised key → All documents re-validated, signers notified

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
8️⃣  AUDIT TRAIL & IMMUTABILITY (COMPLIANCE — MANDATORY)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

AUDIT_LOG_EVENTS (ALL MANDATORY — CANNOT BE DISABLED) =
  DOC_CREATED           → {doc_id, initiator_id, doc_type, tenant_id, timestamp}
  DOC_SENT              → {doc_id, sent_to[], send_timestamp}
  SIGNER_VIEWED         → {doc_id, signer_id, ip, device, geo, timestamp}
  SIGNER_DECLINED       → {doc_id, signer_id, reason, timestamp}
  SIGNATURE_CAPTURED    → {doc_id, signer_id, sig_method, hash, timestamp}
  SIGNATURE_VERIFIED    → {doc_id, signer_id, verification_method, result}
  DOC_COMPLETED         → {doc_id, final_hash, all_signer_ids, timestamp}
  DOC_VOIDED            → {doc_id, voided_by, reason, timestamp}
  DOC_EXPIRED           → {doc_id, expiry_time, partial_signers[]}
  TAMPER_DETECTED       → {doc_id, detected_at, delta_report}
  DOC_DISPUTED          → {doc_id, raised_by, reason, timestamp}
  DOC_DOWNLOADED        → {doc_id, downloaded_by, timestamp}
  REMINDER_SENT         → {doc_id, signer_id, reminder_number, timestamp}

AUDIT_STORAGE =
  Primary    : PostgreSQL (structured, tenant-isolated)
  Event Bus  : Kafka (real-time, immutable event stream)
  Archive    : S3-compatible cold storage (7-year retention minimum)
  Backup     : Geo-replicated, encrypted at rest (AES-256)

AUDIT_IMMUTABILITY_RULES =
  Audit records are APPEND-ONLY
  No update or delete on audit log = ABSOLUTE
  Any attempt to modify → SECURITY INCIDENT, Admin alerted
  Audit export = Compliance Admin only + logged access

AUDIT_REPORT_GENERATION =
  Per-document audit certificate: Auto-generated on COMPLETED
  Batch audit reports: Compliance Admin tool
  Regulatory export: CSV / JSON / PDF per jurisdiction requirement

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
9️⃣  DATA ARCHITECTURE (POSTGRESQL SCHEMA — LOCKED)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

TABLES REQUIRED:

-- Core Document Registry
esign_documents (
  id                UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_id         UUID NOT NULL,            -- hard tenant isolation
  doc_type          VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,     -- references REGISTERED_DOCUMENT_TEMPLATES
  title             VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  template_version  VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  state             VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,     -- DRAFT | PENDING_SIGNATURES | etc.
  initiator_id      UUID NOT NULL,
  created_at        TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
  updated_at        TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
  expiry_at         TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
  signing_mode      VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,     -- SEQUENTIAL | PARALLEL | HYBRID
  domain            VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,     -- inherited domain isolation
  jurisdiction      VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,     -- IN | EU | US | etc.
  doc_hash_draft    VARCHAR(128),             -- SHA-512 on latest draft
  doc_hash_final    VARCHAR(128),             -- SHA-512 post-COMPLETED seal
  storage_ref       TEXT                      -- S3 path encrypted
)

-- Signer Registry per Document
esign_signers (
  id                UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  doc_id            UUID REFERENCES esign_documents(id),
  signer_id         UUID NOT NULL,            -- user_id from User Service
  signer_role       VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  sign_order        INTEGER,                  -- NULL = parallel
  status            VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL,     -- PENDING | VIEWED | SIGNED | DECLINED
  signature_method  VARCHAR(30),             -- TYPED | DRAWN | AADHAAR | CERT
  signature_hash    VARCHAR(128),
  signed_at         TIMESTAMPTZ,
  ip_at_sign        INET,
  device_at_sign    TEXT,
  geo_at_sign       TEXT,
  mfa_verified      BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  declined_reason   TEXT
)

-- Immutable Audit Log
esign_audit_log (
  id                BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,   -- never UUID, never deletable
  doc_id            UUID NOT NULL,
  event_type        VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  actor_id          UUID,
  actor_ip          INET,
  actor_device      TEXT,
  actor_geo         TEXT,
  event_payload     JSONB NOT NULL,
  event_timestamp   TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
  is_system_event   BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE
)

-- Document Templates (Tenant-Scoped)
esign_templates (
  id                UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_id         UUID,                     -- NULL = platform default
  doc_type          VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  version           VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  schema_json       JSONB NOT NULL,           -- field definitions
  approved_by       UUID,                     -- Compliance Admin ID
  approved_at       TIMESTAMPTZ,
  is_active         BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at        TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL
)

-- Signature Field Definitions per Document
esign_signature_fields (
  id                UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  doc_id            UUID REFERENCES esign_documents(id),
  signer_id         UUID REFERENCES esign_signers(id),
  field_type        VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL,     -- SIGNATURE | INITIALS | DATE | CHECKBOX
  page_number       INTEGER NOT NULL,
  x_position        DECIMAL NOT NULL,
  y_position        DECIMAL NOT NULL,
  is_required       BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  completed         BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE
)

-- Reminder Tracking
esign_reminders (
  id                UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  doc_id            UUID NOT NULL,
  signer_id         UUID NOT NULL,
  reminder_number   INTEGER NOT NULL,         -- 1st / 2nd / 3rd
  sent_at           TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
  delivery_status   VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL      -- SENT | DELIVERED | FAILED
)

-- Dispute Records
esign_disputes (
  id                UUID PRIMARY KEY,
  doc_id            UUID NOT NULL,
  raised_by         UUID NOT NULL,
  reason            TEXT NOT NULL,
  raised_at         TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
  resolved_at       TIMESTAMPTZ,
  resolution_status VARCHAR(30),             -- DISPUTE_RESOLVED | LEGALLY_CHALLENGED
  resolved_by       UUID,
  resolution_notes  TEXT
)

INDEXING_STRATEGY =
  esign_documents  → idx on (tenant_id, state, expiry_at)
  esign_signers    → idx on (doc_id, signer_id, status)
  esign_audit_log  → idx on (doc_id, event_timestamp) — PARTIAL (immutable)
  esign_reminders  → idx on (doc_id, signer_id, sent_at)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🔟  MICROSERVICE ARCHITECTURE (BACKEND — LOCKED)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

SERVICE_NAME      = ESIGN_CONNECT_SERVICE
LANGUAGE          = GO (primary microservice)
FRAMEWORK         = Fiber / gRPC
TRANSPORT         = REST (internal) + gRPC (cross-service)
MESSAGE_BROKER    = Kafka (async event pipeline)
STORAGE           = PostgreSQL (primary) + Redis (session, rate limit) + S3 (docs)
CRYPTO_PROVIDER   = AWS KMS / Azure Key Vault (tenant-isolated)
PDF_ENGINE        = PDFium (rendering) + iTextSharp/libpdf (LTV signing)

INTERNAL_APIS (consumed by this service) =
  → User Service           : Identity, role, MFA verification
  → Auth Service           : Session validation, RBAC check
  → Notification Service   : Email, SMS, In-app reminder dispatch
  → Job Portal Service     : Offer locking trigger (post COMPLETED)
  → ERP Service            : Contract binding trigger
  → Analytics Service      : Signing funnel metrics
  → Compliance Service     : Audit log sink
  → Storage Service        : Document upload / retrieval (S3 abstraction)

EXTERNAL_INTEGRATIONS =
  → UIDAI Aadhaar eSign API    (India — Aadhaar-linked signature)
  → RFC 3161 TSA               (Timestamp Authority — multiple providers)
  → CA / PKI Provider          (QES certificate issuance)
  → Email Gateway              (Reminder + delivery receipts)
  → SMS Gateway                (OTP delivery for SES)

KAFKA_TOPICS_PRODUCED =
  esign.document.created
  esign.document.sent
  esign.document.signed
  esign.document.completed
  esign.document.voided
  esign.document.expired
  esign.document.disputed
  esign.tamper.detected

KAFKA_TOPICS_CONSUMED =
  user.identity.verified       (triggers sign-gate unlock)
  job.offer.extended           (triggers OFFER_LETTER document creation)
  project.mentor.assigned      (triggers MENTOR_AGREEMENT creation)
  compliance.audit.requested   (triggers audit export)

RATE_LIMITING =
  Signing attempts    : 5/hour per signer per document
  OTP requests        : 3/10 minutes per user
  Document creation   : 100/day per tenant (configurable per plan)
  API calls           : Per-tenant token bucket (Redis)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
1️⃣1️⃣  UI SPECIFICATION — FLUTTER FIRST (ANTIGRAVITY ENGINE RULES)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

UI_FRAMEWORK       = FLUTTER (primary)
UI_WEB_CLONE       = React (Next.js) — SEO read-only clone
DESIGN_LANGUAGE    = CLEAN | SOLID | FUNCTION-FIRST (inherited from Master)
DECORATIVE_UI      = FORBIDDEN
SCREENSHOT_BLOCK   = ENABLED on all signing screens

SCREENS_REQUIRED =

  SC-01 : DOCUMENT INBOX
    Role     : All signers
    Purpose  : List of documents awaiting signature / sent / completed
    Layout   : Tabbed: Pending | Completed | Voided | Expired
    Fixed    : Identity block, compliance badge, pending count
    Custom   : Sort / filter by doc_type, date, sender

  SC-02 : DOCUMENT PREVIEW
    Role     : All signers (pre-sign)
    Purpose  : Full document read + field highlight
    Layout   : Full-screen scroll PDF viewer, field indicator ribbon
    Fixed    : Signing deadline, signer list status
    Rules    : Screenshot blocked, clipboard blocked

  SC-03 : SIGNATURE CAPTURE
    Role     : Active signer
    Purpose  : Capture signature using method (typed/drawn/cert/Aadhaar)
    Layout   : Method selector → Capture area → MFA confirmation
    Fixed    : Identity verification status, legal consent declaration
    Rules    : Screen recording blocked, no back-navigation during MFA

  SC-04 : MULTI-PARTY SIGNING STATUS
    Role     : Initiator + All signers
    Purpose  : View who has signed, who is pending, timestamps
    Layout   : Signer progress timeline with status indicators
    Fixed    : Document state badge, deadline timer

  SC-05 : DOCUMENT COMPOSER (Initiator)
    Role     : Recruiter / HR / Enterprise Admin / Platform Admin
    Purpose  : Create document from template, assign signers, set fields
    Layout   : Template selector → Field placer → Signer sequencer → Send
    Fixed    : Required fields indicator, compliance checklist

  SC-06 : COMPLETED DOCUMENT VIEWER
    Role     : All parties post-COMPLETED
    Purpose  : View sealed, signed document with signature stamps
    Layout   : PDF viewer with embedded signature panels
    Fixed    : Audit certificate link, download button, hash fingerprint display

  SC-07 : AUDIT TRAIL VIEWER
    Role     : Compliance Admin / Platform Admin
    Purpose  : Full event log for any document
    Layout   : Chronological event list with IP, device, geo, timestamps
    Fixed    : Export to PDF / CSV, tamper indicator

  SC-08 : DISPUTE MANAGEMENT
    Role     : Compliance Admin
    Purpose  : View, investigate, resolve disputes
    Layout   : Dispute list → Detail → Resolution form
    Fixed    : Document hash verification status, escalation path

  SC-09 : TEMPLATE BUILDER (Admin)
    Role     : Platform Admin / Compliance Admin
    Purpose  : Create / edit / approve document templates
    Layout   : Schema editor + field configurator + approval workflow
    Fixed    : Version number, approval status, active/inactive toggle

  SC-10 : SIGNING ANALYTICS DASHBOARD
    Role     : ERP Admin / Analytics Admin
    Purpose  : Funnel metrics — sent → viewed → signed → completed rates
    Layout   : Charts: completion rate, avg time-to-sign, expiry rate
    Fixed    : Tenant scope selector, date range filter

SCREEN_RULES (INHERITED FROM MASTER UI LOCK) =
  - All screens respect RBAC — no admin screen for student role
  - State-driven visibility: buttons appear ONLY when action is legal
  - Forbidden actions = HIDDEN (never disabled-visible)
  - Loading, empty, error states MANDATORY on all screens
  - Accessibility: WCAG 2.1 AA (inherited from Master)
  - RTL support: ENABLED
  - Offline: signing screens = BLOCKED offline (security requirement)
  - Screenshot/recording: BLOCKED on SC-02, SC-03, SC-06

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
1️⃣2️⃣  NOTIFICATION MATRIX (AUTOMATED — LOCKED)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

NOTIFICATION_EVENTS =

  DOC_SENT         → Signer: In-App + Email + SMS (if critical doc)
  REMINDER_1       → Signer: In-App + Email (48hr before expiry)
  REMINDER_2       → Signer: In-App + Email + SMS (24hr before expiry)
  REMINDER_3       → Signer: In-App + Email + SMS (6hr before expiry)
  SIGNATURE_DONE   → Initiator: In-App + Email (per signer who completes)
  DOC_COMPLETED    → All parties: In-App + Email (with sealed PDF link)
  DOC_EXPIRED      → Initiator + All pending signers: In-App + Email
  DOC_VOIDED       → All parties: In-App + Email
  TAMPER_DETECTED  → Compliance Admin: In-App + Email + CRITICAL_ALERT
  DISPUTE_RAISED   → Compliance Admin + All parties: In-App + Email

NOTIFICATION_RULES =
  All notifications tenant-isolated — no cross-tenant leakage
  Sensitive document titles → REDACTED in SMS / push notifications
  Notification content localized per user locale
  Delivery receipt logged in esign_reminders table
  Failed delivery → retry 3x (exponential backoff) → ALERT if persistent

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
1️⃣3️⃣  INTEGRATION MAP (MODULE ↔ ESIGN_CONNECT)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

JOB PORTAL ENGINE
  Trigger  : Offer status = OFFER_EXTENDED
  Action   : ESIGN_CONNECT auto-creates DOC_TYPE_001 (OFFER_LETTER)
  Complete : ESIGN_CONNECT fires esign.document.completed → Job Portal locks offer
  Reversal : Voided offer letter → Job Portal returns to OFFER_REVOKED state

SKILL DEVELOPMENT ENGINE
  Trigger  : Trainer enrolled, course assigned
  Action   : ESIGN_CONNECT creates DOC_TYPE_005 (TRAINING_CONTRACT)
  Complete : Signed contract → Skill Engine marks enrollment binding

PROJECT EXECUTION ENGINE
  Trigger  : Mentor assigned to student project
  Action   : ESIGN_CONNECT creates DOC_TYPE_004 (MENTOR_AGREEMENT)
  Complete : Signed → Project Engine unlocks mentor access to project workspace

GROUP DISCUSSION / DOJO ENGINE
  Trigger  : Evaluation session scheduled
  Action   : ESIGN_CONNECT creates DOC_TYPE_008 (EVALUATION_CONSENT)
  Complete : Signed → Dojo session unlocked for evaluated student

INSTITUTE ERP
  Trigger  : New institute onboarding initiated
  Action   : ESIGN_CONNECT creates DOC_TYPE_006 (INSTITUTE_MOU)
  Complete : Signed MOU → ERP activates institute tenant

CORPORATE / SME ERP
  Trigger  : SME hiring contract stage reached
  Action   : ESIGN_CONNECT creates DOC_TYPE_009 (SME_HIRING_CONTRACT)
  Complete : Signed → ERP marks hire as legally bound

COMPLIANCE & AUDIT ERP
  Sink     : All esign_audit_log entries replicated to Compliance Audit DB
  Report   : Compliance Admin can pull complete signing audit per tenant
  Export   : Regulatory-format export (jurisdiction-specific)

PARENT TRUST LAYER
  Trigger  : Minor student action requiring parental consent
  Action   : ESIGN_CONNECT creates DOC_TYPE_007 (PARENT_AUTHORIZATION)
  Complete : Parent OTP-signed → Action unlocked for student

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
1️⃣4️⃣  SECURITY & COMPLIANCE RULES (ABSOLUTE — NON-NEGOTIABLE)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

ABSOLUTE_RULES =
  1. No document can be signed without identity verification + MFA
  2. No document can be altered after COMPLETED state
  3. No audit log entry can be modified or deleted
  4. No cross-tenant document access under any condition
  5. No AI agent may execute a signature
  6. No signature bypasses allowed — even for Platform Admin
  7. All cryptographic operations via server-side HSM only
  8. Private keys never transmitted to client
  9. Signing screens block screenshots / screen recording
  10. Expired documents cannot be re-activated — new DRAFT required

PENETRATION_HARDENING =
  → Input injection testing on all form fields
  → Document template schema validation (anti-injection)
  → Clickjacking prevention (X-Frame-Options DENY on signing pages)
  → CSRF tokens on all mutation endpoints
  → Rate limiting on signing + OTP endpoints (Redis token bucket)
  → Geo-anomaly detection on signing events (flag unusual geography)

DATA_RETENTION =
  COMPLETED documents  : 7-year minimum retention (regulatory)
  VOIDED documents     : 3-year retention
  EXPIRED documents    : 1-year retention
  Audit logs           : 10-year minimum (compliance)
  User deletion request: PII anonymized, document structure preserved

RIGHT_TO_ERASURE (GDPR / PDPB) =
  User PII anonymized in documents on deletion request
  Document legal structure preserved (audit integrity)
  Anonymization event logged in audit trail

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
1️⃣5️⃣  FOUR-STAGE DEVELOPMENT BINDING (LOCKED — SEQUENTIAL)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

STAGE 1 — FOUNDATION (ESIGN_CONNECT CORE)
  ✔ DB schema setup (all 7 tables)
  ✔ Document lifecycle state machine
  ✔ SES signing (Typed name + OTP MFA)
  ✔ Offer Letter (DOC_TYPE_001) workflow
  ✔ Audit log (append-only)
  ✔ Flutter UI: SC-01, SC-02, SC-03, SC-04
  ✔ Notification: Email + In-App
  ✔ Job Portal integration (Offer lock)

STAGE 2 — INTELLIGENCE
  ✔ AES signing (RSA/ECDSA + HSM)
  ✔ Signing analytics dashboard (SC-10)
  ✔ AI-assisted template suggestions (advisory only — AI never signs)
  ✔ Signing funnel Kafka analytics
  ✔ Completion rate predictors

STAGE 3 — ECOSYSTEM
  ✔ All 10 DOC_TYPEs deployed
  ✔ All module integrations (ERP, Dojo, Project, Skill)
  ✔ Aadhaar eSign integration (India)
  ✔ Custom tenant template builder (SC-09)
  ✔ Parent trust layer integration

STAGE 4 — COMPLIANCE & SCALE
  ✔ QES (CA-issued certificate) support
  ✔ RFC 3161 Trusted Timestamp (TSA)
  ✔ PDF/A-3 LTV sealing
  ✔ Multi-jurisdiction compliance (IN / EU / US)
  ✔ Dispute management (SC-08)
  ✔ Full audit export + regulatory reporting
  ✔ 10-year archive cold storage tier
  ✔ Data retention + right-to-erasure automation

STAGE_SKIPPING = FORBIDDEN
STAGE_MIXING   = FORBIDDEN
PARTIAL_STAGE  = INVALID BUILD

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
1️⃣6️⃣  ANTI-FRAUD & ANTI-CHEAT (ESIGN-SPECIFIC ENFORCEMENT)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

FRAUD_VECTORS_BLOCKED =
  1. PROXY SIGNING         → Biometric + MFA link ensures only verified user signs
  2. DUPLICATE SIGNATURE   → Doc state machine prevents re-signing a COMPLETED doc
  3. BACKDATING            → RFC 3161 TSA timestamp is authoritative, not user-provided
  4. SIGNATURE INJECTION   → Hash verification on every field; tamper = ALERT
  5. IDENTITY IMPERSONATION→ Platform auth + MFA + Aadhaar/cert verification
  6. FORGED TEMPLATES      → Admin approval required; version-controlled hash
  7. CLIPBOARD EXFILTRATION→ Clipboard disabled on signing screens
  8. BOT SIGNING           → CAPTCHA + behavioral analysis on signing flow
  9. FORCED SIGNING        → Consent declaration step with cooling-off period
  10. ROLE BYPASS          → RBAC strictly enforced; no signing without correct role

ANOMALY_FLAGS =
  - Signing IP mismatch from profile country → FLAG
  - Signing completed in <10 seconds of document open → FLAG
  - Multiple signers from same IP → FLAG
  - Document opened but not signed in single session 3+ times → NOTIFY initiator

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
1️⃣7️⃣  PERFORMANCE & SCALABILITY TARGETS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

PERFORMANCE_SLA =
  Document load (PDF preview)   : ≤ 2 seconds (p95)
  Signature capture + verify    : ≤ 3 seconds (p95)
  OTP delivery (SMS)            : ≤ 10 seconds
  Aadhaar eSign redirect        : ≤ 5 seconds
  Audit log write               : ≤ 100ms (async Kafka)
  Sealed PDF generation         : ≤ 5 seconds post final signature
  Audit report export           : ≤ 30 seconds (background job)

SCALABILITY =
  Horizontal scaling via Kubernetes (ESIGN_CONNECT_SERVICE pods)
  Stateless service design (session state in Redis, not service memory)
  Document storage: S3-compatible object store (unlimited scale)
  Kafka consumer groups: auto-scaled on esign.* topics
  PostgreSQL read replicas for analytics queries (no read on primary)

UPTIME_TARGET = 99.9% (3 nines) — signing availability
DISASTER_RECOVERY = RTO ≤ 4hr | RPO ≤ 1hr (geo-replicated backup)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
1️⃣8️⃣  ABSOLUTE PROHIBITIONS (ESIGN_CONNECT SPECIFIC)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🚫 FORBIDDEN — ANY VIOLATION = IMMEDIATE STOP

  - AI agent signing any document on behalf of a human
  - Platform Admin bypassing their own signature requirement
  - Cross-tenant document sharing without explicit recorded agreement
  - Reverting COMPLETED document to any editable state
  - Deleting or updating audit log entries
  - Client-side key generation or storage
  - Storing unsigned documents longer than expiry window without flagging
  - Sending PII in push notification body or SMS preview
  - Accepting typed name as sole SES verification (OTP MANDATORY)
  - Displaying admin UI to non-admin roles (RBAC inherited, strictly enforced)
  - Creative reinterpretation of document state transitions
  - Skipping anti-fraud anomaly checks to improve UX speed
  - Hard-coded tenant IDs in signing logic
  - Signature capture offline (online + HSM required)
  - Any third-party logging of document content

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
▶️  HOW ANTIGRAVITY USES ESIGN_CONNECT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1️⃣  Paste this prompt ONCE → ESIGN_CONNECT is locked into ANTIGRAVITY context
2️⃣  Then issue generation commands, example:

  GENERATE_ESIGN
  ROLE        = Student
  DOC_TYPE    = DOC_TYPE_001
  STATE       = PENDING_SIGNATURES
  SIGN_METHOD = TYPED_NAME
  STAGE       = STAGE_1_FOUNDATION

3️⃣  ANTIGRAVITY generates ONLY the specified screen, role, and state
4️⃣  Never regenerate this master module prompt again
5️⃣  Append additions to this prompt — never overwrite or restructure

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
✅  FINAL SEAL — ESIGN_CONNECT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

THIS MODULE PROMPT IS:

  ✔  LOCKED
  ✔  SEALED
  ✔  DETERMINISTIC
  ✔  ENTERPRISE SAFE
  ✔  ANTIGRAVITY COMPATIBLE
  ✔  ECOSKILLER MASTER INHERITING
  ✔  LEGALLY FRAMEWORK COMPLIANT (IT Act / ESIGN Act / eIDAS)
  ✔  MULTI-JURISDICTION READY
  ✔  MULTI-TENANT ISOLATED
  ✔  CRYPTOGRAPHICALLY SECURED
  ✔  AUDIT IMMUTABLE
  ✔  STAGE-SEQUENCED

MODULE_LOCK_VERSION   = 1.0.0
LOCKED_BY             = ECOSKILLER PLATFORM ARCHITECT
LOCK_TIMESTAMP        = 2026-02-24T00:00:00Z
FURTHER_CHANGES       = APPEND_ONLY (ADD_ONLY POLICY)
BREAKING_CHANGES      = REQUIRE MAJOR VERSION BUMP + ARCHITECT APPROVAL

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

ANY DEVIATION FROM THIS MODULE SPEC = STOP EXECUTION
ANY CREATIVE REINTERPRETATION        = STOP EXECUTION
ANY ASSUMPTION FILL                  = STOP EXECUTION
ANY CROSS-TENANT LEAK                = STOP EXECUTION + SECURITY INCIDENT

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🔒  ESIGN_CONNECT — SEALED & LOCKED — ANTIGRAVITY ENGINE
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
